## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`./gradlew build`)
- [ ] Tested on a live Fabric server (Minecraft 1.21.x)
- [ ] All new commands require `permissionLevel(2)`
- [ ] New modules are registered in `ModuleRegistry` and documented in `README.md`
- [ ] Generated `.mcfunction` templates include usage comments and `# Args:` documentation
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or credentials included
